acceptance_targets: [ch17-prose-001] PASS if no more than one emotional beat in the chapter uses the "look...that..." facial-summary pattern and the revised moments render emotion through unique observable behavior; FAIL if the repeated template remains at three occurrences.

[ch17-prose-002] PASS if the revised section from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:433 to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:455 includes at least three distinct Eli-internal beats and contains no 10+ paragraph run without internal experience; FAIL if the span remains externally staged only.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than one emotional beat in the chapter uses the "look...that..." facial-summary pattern and the revised moments render emotion through unique observable behavior; FAIL if the repeated template remains at three occurrences.
findings.evidence: Facial-expression default repeats with near-identical construction at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:91, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:221, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:387.
findings.problem: A recurring "look that was..." template appears three times, signaling autopilot prose and flattening emotional differentiation across key beats.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace at least two of the beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:91, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:221, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:387 with distinct physical-action or sensory-response cues instead of evaluative facial-summary templates.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised section from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:433 to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:455 includes at least three distinct Eli-internal beats and contains no 10+ paragraph run without internal experience; FAIL if the span remains externally staged only.
findings.evidence: There is a 10+ paragraph run with minimal focal interiority during onboarding from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:433 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:455 before interior processing returns at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:457.
findings.problem: Interiority drops out long enough for the focalized narrative to read like external transcript/staging, weakening close-third pressure at a consequential reentry moment.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the onboarding span anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:433, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:447, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:451, insert short Eli-internal beats (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment) tied to warehouse stimuli and accountability stakes.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
